author: SegmentLinking
body:
#### PR description:

This should fix the issue reported in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/51512.

#### PR validation:

The workflow runs successfully for `34634.713` using the GPU accelerator.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

No

FYI @slava77 @mmasciov
title: Fix SerialSync sequence for Phase-2 offline LST-seeded mkFit
